ab: uzianga ti sinsi.
en: The teacher is here.

ab: mayanga kivangavang, kirimu qiladju a sema tua su qiladjan.
ch: B:不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.

ab: djavadjavay, sekavililj anga aken!
en: Sorry, I’m late!

ab: saumaqanu.
en: Come in quickly.

ab: sikamasan pidalj a qadav tucu ta tapulavayan?
en: What day is it today?

ab: sikamasanlimalj tucu a qadav, pulavay nutuav, ari kivangavangi!
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧!
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!

ab: ui! vaiki a sema pana.
en: Great! Let’s go to the riverside.

ab: sikamasan pidalj a qadav nutiav ta tapulavayan?
en: What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: sikamasantjelulj nutiav ta tapulavayan, vaikianga seman mali nu masukincengelj!
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧!
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!

ab: anema uri su salima nutiav a kadjamadjaman?
en: What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: pulavalavay nutiav, uri vaik aken kati kina a sema kiukay.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.

ab: makuda sun?
en: What’s wrong?

ab: pasa mutjaq aken, vaik aken a sema binziyu.
en: I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.

ab: mavengav a ku qulu.
en: I feel dizzy.

ab: kitjuqemu anan a kisuzelian.
en: Lie down and rest.

ab: sinsi, saketju a ku tjialj, vaik a ken a sema binziyu.
ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.

ab: ui, pakirimu.
en: Okay, go quickly.

ab: a maqati aken a sema binziyu?
en: May I go wash my hands?

ab: uri, qemacuvung anga tja kitulu vaiku anga nusauni.
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: sinsi, saqetju a ku qulu, pulavay aken nu numasukincengelj.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: ui, kinemenemu nu tjumaq sun.
en: Okay, take care and go home.

ab: sinsi, uri pulavay aken nu tjaivililj ta sangasangasan na tapulavayan, vaik aken a kipucemel.
ch: A:老師，我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.

ab: ui, kanavenalavalau.
en: Alright, take care of yourself.

ab: izainu ti Muni?
en: Where is Muni?

ab: saqetjuqetju a tjialj nimadju, sa izua timadju i binziyu.
en: She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.

ab: izainu ti Puljaljuyan?
en: Where is Puljaljuyan?

ab: sinsi, saqetjuqetju a liqe ni Puljaljuyan, sa napulavay tucu a qadav.
en: Teacher, Puljaljuyan has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.

ab: akua inika namangetjez ti Muni?
en: Why didn’t Muni come?

ab: masezasezam timadju.
en: She has a fever.
